nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Creamy-bellied antwren
nodes.summary: Creamy-bellied antwren（Creamy-bellied antwren，学名 Herpsilochmus motacilloides），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits it interior and edges of humid montane forest where it favors areas with tall trees and much moss and epiphytes

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The primary threat to this species is accelerating deforestation in its range as forests are logged for conversion into pastures and agriculture cultivation." It is considered uncommon to locally fairly common
